name: Block Known Phishing Domains
description: Blocks navigation to known phishing domains and displays a warning overlay.
author: phoenix-edr

params.message: This site has been identified as a phishing domain by Phoenix EDR.
Blocked navigation to phishing domain

params.title: Phishing Blocked
params.message: A known phishing site was blocked.

name: Block Malware Distribution Domains
description: Blocks access to domains known for distributing malware.
author: phoenix-edr

params.message: This site is known to distribute malware.
Blocked navigation to malware domain

name: Detect SSN in Form Fields
description: Detects Social Security Number patterns entered into form fields and warns the user.
author: phoenix-edr

params.message: This form appears to contain a Social Security Number. Submission blocked for review.
SSN pattern detected in form submission

params.title: SSN Detected
params.message: A Social Security Number pattern was detected in a form.

name: Detect Credit Card Numbers in Forms
description: Detects credit card number patterns entered into form fields.
author: phoenix-edr

params.message: This form appears to contain a credit card number. Submission blocked for review.
Credit card pattern detected in form submission

name: Detect Email Addresses in Forms
description: Detects email addresses being submitted in forms on non-whitelisted domains.
author: phoenix-edr

params.message: Email address detected in form submission
An email address was detected in this form submission.

name: Block Dangerous File Uploads
description: Blocks uploading of executable and script files.
author: phoenix-edr

params.message: Uploading executable files is not permitted.
Dangerous file upload blocked

name: Block AI Chat Platforms
description: Blocks access to AI chat platforms to prevent data exfiltration. Disabled by default.
author: phoenix-edr

params.message: Access to AI chat platforms is restricted by company policy.
AI chat platform access blocked

name: Block Company Secrets in Forms
description: Template rule to detect company-specific confidential patterns. Disabled by default - customize patterns before enabling.
author: phoenix-edr

params.message: This form contains confidential information. Submission blocked.
Confidential content detected in form

params.title: Confidential Data Leak Attempt
params.message: A form submission containing confidential markers was blocked.

name: Log External Script Loading
description: Logs all external script elements loaded on the page for security auditing. Disabled by default.
author: phoenix-edr

params.message: External scripts detected on page

name: Detect DOM XSS Patterns
description: Detects common DOM-based XSS patterns in page content.
author: phoenix-edr

params.message: Potential DOM XSS pattern detected

params.title: DOM XSS Detected
params.message: A potential DOM-based cross-site scripting pattern was detected.
Warning: Suspicious script activity detected on this page.
